name: Jack Daniels BBQ Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup to 1 gallon Jack Daniels Whiskey
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine onion, garlic, and bourbon in a 3-quart saucepan.
2. Saute until the onion and garlic are translucent, about 10 minutes.
3. Add all remaining ingredients and bring mixture to a boil.
4. Reduce heat to a medium simmer and let it cook for 20 minutes, stirring constantly.
5. Strain if desired for a smoother sauce.
6. Makes 4 cups.
